craftRegistry.description: Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds one modifier when its effective Magic capacity and eligible pool allow one; zero-capacity bases transition with no explicit modifier.
Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds one modifier of Minimum Modifier Level 44 when an effective Magic slot exists; zero-capacity bases transition with no explicit modifier.
Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds one modifier of Minimum Modifier Level 70 when an effective Magic slot exists; zero-capacity bases transition with no explicit modifier.
Adds a modifier to a Magic item.
Adds a modifier to a Magic item with Minimum Modifier Level 44.
Adds a modifier to a Magic item with Minimum Modifier Level 70.
Upgrades a Normal item to Rare and rolls up to four fresh modifiers within its effective Rare capacity.
Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier.
Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier with Minimum Modifier Level 35.
Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier with Minimum Modifier Level 50.
Adds a modifier to a Rare item with an open affix slot.
Adds a modifier to a Rare item with Minimum Modifier Level 35.
Adds a modifier to a Rare item with Minimum Modifier Level 50.
Removes one removable modifier from a Rare item and adds an eligible replacement.
Modifies a Rare item and applies Minimum Modifier Level 35 to the replacement.
Modifies a Rare item and applies Minimum Modifier Level 50 to the replacement.
Removes a random removable explicit modifier.
Rerolls eligible numeric values on non-fractured modifiers.
Fractures a random revealed modifier on a Rare item with at least four modifiers.
Applies a Lock that previews the next supported item mutation before it is committed.
craftRegistry.blocker: Normalized source item identity is unavailable; existing runtime behavior is preserved without fabricating a source ID or metadata key.

transmutation.description: Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds one modifier when its effective Magic capacity and eligible pool allow one; zero-capacity bases transition with no explicit modifier.
transmutation.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft transmutation.

greater-transmutation.description: Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds one modifier of Minimum Modifier Level 44 when an effective Magic slot exists; zero-capacity bases transition with no explicit modifier.
greater-transmutation.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft greater-transmutation.

perfect-transmutation.description: Upgrades a Normal item to Magic and adds one modifier of Minimum Modifier Level 70 when an effective Magic slot exists; zero-capacity bases transition with no explicit modifier.
perfect-transmutation.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft perfect-transmutation.

augmentation.description: Adds a modifier to a Magic item.
augmentation.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft augmentation.

greater-augmentation.description: Adds a modifier to a Magic item with Minimum Modifier Level 44.
greater-augmentation.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft greater-augmentation.

perfect-augmentation.description: Adds a modifier to a Magic item with Minimum Modifier Level 70.
perfect-augmentation.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft perfect-augmentation.

alchemy.description: Upgrades a Normal item to Rare and rolls up to four fresh modifiers within its effective Rare capacity.
alchemy.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft alchemy.

regal.description: Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier.
regal.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft regal.

greater-regal.description: Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier with Minimum Modifier Level 35.
greater-regal.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft greater-regal.

perfect-regal.description: Upgrades a Magic item to Rare and adds a modifier with Minimum Modifier Level 50.
perfect-regal.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft perfect-regal.

exalted.description: Adds a modifier to a Rare item with an open affix slot.
exalted.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft exalted.

greater-exalted.description: Adds a modifier to a Rare item with Minimum Modifier Level 35.
greater-exalted.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft greater-exalted.

perfect-exalted.description: Adds a modifier to a Rare item with Minimum Modifier Level 50.
perfect-exalted.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft perfect-exalted.

chaos.description: Removes one removable modifier from a Rare item and adds an eligible replacement.
chaos.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft chaos.

greater-chaos.description: Modifies a Rare item and applies Minimum Modifier Level 35 to the replacement.
greater-chaos.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft greater-chaos.

perfect-chaos.description: Modifies a Rare item and applies Minimum Modifier Level 50 to the replacement.
perfect-chaos.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft perfect-chaos.

annulment.description: Removes a random removable explicit modifier.
annulment.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft annulment.

divine.description: Rerolls eligible numeric values on non-fractured modifiers.
divine.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft divine.

fracturing.description: Fractures a random revealed modifier on a Rare item with at least four modifiers.
fracturing.reason: Implemented by stable runtime craft fracturing.
